title: TSS Transformation Protocol
author: Dennis DD Dienst
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jn5cmg6

steps.title: Inoculate starter culture of 1
steps.instruction: Inoculate starter culture of 1.5 mL LB medium in ~13 mL test tube

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C on shaking device (> 200 rpm)
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C on shaking device (> 200 rpm)

steps.title: After 1
steps.instruction: After 1.5 – 2 hours culture should become slightly turbid (exponential growth)

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 – 1.0 µL plasmid from mini prep (high copy: rather 0.3 µL)

steps.title: Incubate 45-60 min at 37°C on...
steps.instruction: Incubate 45-60 min at 37°C on shaking device (> 200 rpm) – addition of LB is not requested

steps.title: Work on ice
steps.instruction: Work on ice: add 200 mL of culture to 1.5 mL tube and mix with 200 mL 2 x TSS ( dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gt3bwqn )
